title: nepeta nivalis
intro: Nepeta nivalis, also known as winter mint or Arctic catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nepeta nivalis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to calm digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote a good night's sleep.
